task_completion.description: Navigate to the Add New User page in the WordPress admin panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress admin panel is visible with the 'Add New User' form displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the required username and email
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Username' field contains exactly 'marketing_lead' and the 'Email' field contains 'marketing@example.com'.

task_completion.description: Enter the required first and last name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'First Name' field contains 'Sarah' and the 'Last Name' field contains 'Johnson'.
The password field is populated with 'Marketing123!' (either visible as text or indicated by the agent typing this exact string into the password input).

task_completion.description: Set the user role to Editor
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Role' dropdown menu is set to 'Editor'.

task_completion.description: Submit the form to create the user
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'New user created.') is displayed at the top of the screen, or the user 'marketing_lead' is visible in the WordPress Users list table.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to create the user
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser and the WordPress admin dashboard, not terminal commands (like WP-CLI) being executed.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual WordPress application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a valid local or remote WordPress URL, and the interface matches a standard WordPress admin panel, not a text editor or static mock page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open to artificially inject the success message or user row into the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected user parameters to verify are: Username: 'marketing_lead', Email: 'marketing@example.com', First Name: 'Sarah', Last Name: 'Johnson', Role: 'editor' (or 'Editor'), and Password: 'Marketing123!'.
